name: HIRSCHSPRÜNG DISEASE
definition: AGANGLIONOSIS OF THE COLON = AGANGLIONIC MEGACOLON complete / partial functional colonic obstruction ← absence of parasympathetic ganglia in

demographics.Etiology: arrest of craniocaudal migration of neural crest cells along vagal trunks during 5th-
demographics.Prevalence: 1÷5,000-8,000 live births; 15-20% of all neonatal bowel obstructions; usually

demographics.Location: at varying distances proximal to anus, usually rectosigmoid (in 80%) and rectum
